The Process

How It Works

account_balance_wallet

1. Create Account

Sign up in seconds with our secure encrypted onboarding process. Connect your preferred wallet.

token

2. Deposit Capital

Choose your investment tier and fund your trading pool. Assets are protected by cold storage protocols.

rocket_launch

3. Watch Growth

Our AI executes trades 24/7. Monitor your daily profit accruals in real-time on your dashboard.
